## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI's marketing collateral, events planning, and brand strategy with GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge to finalize collateral decks: company overview, capabilities, and quality control process](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Planning first networking event (50-person happy hour) at GrowthX office on Aug 28th](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Decision needed on website platform (Webflow vs alternatives) to unblock blog publishing](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Brand exercise planned to align on Surge's identity, tone, and visual direction](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)

## Topics

### Marketing Collateral Development

  - [Focusing on three key decks: company overview, capabilities, and quality control process](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Overview deck nearly complete, capabilities deck to be expanded](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Quality control deck to be technical yet not fully reproducible](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Scott, Nick, and Edwin as key sources for content; interviews to be conducted](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### Events Planning

  - [First event: 50-person happy hour at GrowthX office, tentatively set for August 28th](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [No formal agenda, focusing on networking and ecosystem building](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Aim for mix of existing contacts, vouching partners, and \~30% new prospects](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Potential to leverage event for hiring efforts and candidate engagement](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Future events may scale up to larger venues (e.g., hotel rooftops)](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

### Website and Blog Strategy

  - [Current platform (Webflow) limits flexibility; decision needed on keeping or changing](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Immediate goal: unblock blog publishing capability](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Nick to share LMSS blog draft for content presentation exploration](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Two-path approach: explore Webflow optimization and alternative platform options](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)

### Brand Exercise

  - [90-120 minute session planned to define Surge's brand identity](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Will cover brand pillars, presentation values, tone of voice, and cultural values](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Aims to align team on consistent language and visual direction](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
  - [Particular focus on strengthening Surge's hiring brand](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)

### Hiring and Recruitment

  - [Desire to improve overall hiring reach and brand strength](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Potential to leverage events and brand exercise for recruitment efforts](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Early grad program mentioned as potential talent pool for future events](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize date (Aug 28th) and begin planning for first networking event](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Scott and Nick to clarify Webflow access and working model with Gene](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Nick to share LMSS blog draft for content presentation exploration](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Schedule brand exercise session with key Surge team members](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide sample copy for About page based on overview deck](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [Continue contract discussions with Bradley while moving forward on agreed scope](https://fathom.video/share/egkgeCSkoskUmtrbf-keiDZfhXP7L_yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
